blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add evidence for waitlist promotion validation
Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the promotion of waitlisted customers when capacity opens.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of promoting customers from the waitlist when capacity opens. However, the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations that demonstrate this functionality, specifically the auto-promotion of waitlisted customers when additional capacity is confirmed. The existing evidence focuses on bookings and waitlist management but fails to address the core requirement of promotion from the waitlist, indicating a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming the auto-promotion of waitlisted customers when additional capacity becomes available.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for waitlist promotion validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the promotion of waitlisted customers when capacity opens.
